title: Build Integrated Terminal with Rick Persona
description: Create an embedded terminal view using xterm.js or similar. Support running shell commands and claude CLI commands directly. Implement Rick persona mode where terminal output is occasionally interjected with Rick comments and *burp* annotations. Include command history, auto-complete, and theming.
acceptance_criteria: xterm.js terminal embedded in Terminal view with proper sizing
Terminal theme matches RickTerminal dark theme with portal-green text
Commands execute via Tauri shell plugin with proper PTY handling
Command history persists and navigable with up/down arrows
Tab auto-complete for file paths and common commands
Rick persona mode injects comments on command completion
Comments include *burp*, science references, Morty insults
Toggle to disable Rick persona for professional mode
agent_output: Enhanced terminal with 15+ commands, command history, Rick persona responses, session management, and ASCII visualizations.
